faqs.question: What pests are included in general pest control service in Carle Place?
faqs.answer: Our general pest control service covers the most common Long Island pests including cockroaches, ants, spiders, silverfish, earwigs, crickets, and occasional invaders. We provide interior and exterior treatments to create a protective barrier around your Carle Place property and eliminate existing infestations.

faqs.question: How much does general pest control cost in Carle Place?
faqs.answer: General pest control services in Carle Place typically range from $175 to $300 depending on your property size, the severity of the infestation, and treatment frequency. We offer free inspections and transparent pricing with no hidden fees, plus discounts for quarterly or annual service plans.

faqs.question: Are your pest control treatments safe for children and pets?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We prioritize the safety of your family and pets by using EPA-approved, low-toxicity products and targeted application methods.
